# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
Only the latest release of Clavis is actively supported.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you discover a security issue:

- Do NOT open a public issue
- Contact the maintainer privately via GitHub security advisory

## Scope
- Keyboard hooks
- Audio playback system
- Soundpack loading
- Hotkey registration

We will respond as quickly as possible and provide fixes in a timely manner.
